tool_args.label: New York City Transit and Bus Committee Meeting - May 2026

payload.description: Operates all subways and buses in New York City
Operates bus services in New York City
Operates rail service on Staten Island

payload.claim_text: The weekday subway schedule revisions implemented on May 18 strategically reallocate running times for optimal performance on 13 subway lines, the 1 2 3 4 5 B D E F M N Q, and R, which we expect will yield continued weekday performance improvements.
payload.subject: Subway schedule revisions May 18, 2026

tool_args.label: Bus Customer Journey Time Performance April 2026

payload.raw_value_text: more than 1.4 million riders on more than one million completed trips
the C to reach 87.9% OTP – its best in modern record-keeping outside of the pandemic period

warnings: metric_claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids on metric payloads refer to route entities and should become explicit relations when supported. Suggested relation: route has_metric metric_claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

payload.raw_value_text: averaging 40,000 completed weekday trips — a new all-time high

payload.description: MTA C&D's first design-build signal modernization project installing Communication-Based Train Control (CBTC) on the Crosstown Line (G train) in Brooklyn and Queens

payload.description: Bundle of 13 stations on the subway and Staten Island Railway across five boroughs. First station completed: new ADA ramp at Harlem-148 St (3 station).
Procurement of 378 subway cars to replace NYC Transit's R68 and R68A subway car fleets from Kawasaki Rail Car, Inc.

tool_args.label: B40721 Express Bus Procurement (92 MCI Buses)

payload.description: Contract award for purchase of 92 over-the-road express clean diesel buses from Motor Coach Industries, Inc. for Staten Island depots, with features including driver enclosure, Collision Avoidance System, OMNY, and Automated Camera Enforcement.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

payload.description: Rehab of power substations across the subway network. 30 substations restored in 2025, additional 13 targeted in 2026 (7 already completed). Historic 2025-2029 Capital Plan invests in 75 substations including 21 for full renewal or new construction.
Schedule adjustments adding more trips on the 2, 3, 4, and 5 lines to improve reliability for 1.2 million daily riders

payload.event_name: New York City Transit and Bus Committee Meeting
payload.description: NYCT and Bus Committee Meeting with Key Performance Metrics, Financial/Ridership Reports, and Final Review of 2025 Operating Results

tool_args.label: State St Power Substation Failure Dec 2024

payload.description: Transformer fault at State St Power Substation in downtown Brooklyn caused explosion, disrupting service on A, C, F, and G lines for hours, leaving 3,500 riders underground on stalled trains

tool_args.label: Harlem-148 St ADA Ramp Completed April 2026

payload.description: MTA completed a new six-foot-wide ADA-compliant ramp at the Harlem-148 St 3 station, making it the latest subway station to become accessible

tool_args.label: 14 St-Union Sq L Elevator Reopened April 2026

payload.description: Mezzanine-to-platform elevator at 14 St-Union Sq L station reopened on budget and one month ahead of schedule

tool_args.label: ACE Expansions on M7, Q10, Q80

payload.description: Automated Camera Enforcement (ACE) expanding coverage on the M7 in Manhattan and Q10/Q80 in Queens, benefiting over one million daily riders across 62 routes

tool_args.label: Demetrius Crichlow is President of NYCT
Frank Farrell is EVP of Buses
NYCT Farebox Operating Ratio April YTD 2026
NYCT Cost per Passenger April YTD 2026
ACE Program Benefits Over One Million Riders

payload.claim_text: Automated Camera Enforcement (ACE) continues to improve bus performance, with recent activations expanding coverage on the M7 in Manhattan and Q10/Q80 in Queens. The program now benefits over one million daily riders across 62 routes.

payload.raw_value_text: 2.91 million, a post-pandemic high for any full month

tool_args.label: G/F Line Signal Work Affecting Service

payload.claim_text: April's lower weekend OTP result was largely driven by planned work, including a significant mid-April service adjustment supporting work to install modern signaling along the G line and a segment of the F line.
